settings.title: Settings
settings.saveError: Could not save. Please try again.

profile.photoRemoveError: Could not remove photo. Please try again.
profile.removePhotoModalBody: This will permanently remove your current profile photo.
profile.photoUploadError: Could not upload photo. Please try again.

security.confirmEmailHint: Confirm your email to secure your account.
security.passwordProviderRequired: Email and password changes require an email/password sign-in method on this account.
security.passwordChangeGoogleOnly: Password change is only available when you sign in with email and password.
security.changeEmailModalBody: We will send a link to the new address. Your sign-in email stays the same until you open that link and confirm. After that, your profile syncs automatically.
security.emailChangeSuccess: Check the new inbox for a verification link. The change completes only after you open it.
security.sessionsHint: Sign out on all devices and invalidate existing sessions.
security.signOutEverywhereModalBody: This will invalidate other sessions. You will need to sign in again on this device.
security.verificationSent: Verification email sent. Check your inbox.

errors.requiresRecentLogin: Please sign in again and retry.
errors.emailInUse: That email is already in use.
errors.tooManyRequests: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
errors.network: Network error. Please check your connection.
errors.operationNotAllowed: Email could not be changed. If this persists, check Firebase Auth settings (authorized domains / email actions).
errors.internalError: Could not send email. Try again in a few minutes.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
